mapper.select: SELECT id, name, code, description, sort_order, enabled, default_chunking_strategy, create_time, update_time FROM document_category ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC
SELECT id, name, code, description, sort_order, enabled, default_chunking_strategy, create_time, update_time FROM document_category WHERE enabled = 1 ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO document_category (name, code, description, sort_order, enabled, default_chunking_strategy, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{name}, #{code}, #{description}, #{sortOrder}, #{enabled}, #{defaultChunkingStrategy}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE document_category SET name=#{name}, code=#{code}, description=#{description}, sort_order=#{sortOrder}, enabled=#{enabled}, default_chunking_strategy=#{defaultChunkingStrategy}, update_time=#{updateTime} WHERE id = #{id}
